sections.paragraph:
Original: תּרתּין תּרין

Transliteration: terêyn tartêyn

Phonetic: ter-ane'

BDB Definition:

  1. two
    1. two (as cardinal number)
    2. second (as ordinal number)
    3. two (in combination with other numbers)

Origin: corresponding to H8147

TWOT entry: 3061c

Part(s) of speech: Noun
